CPC DEFAULT MLB PACKET TEMPLATES
Morning Full-Slate + Confirmed-Lineup Individual Game
Version: 1.0

PURPOSE

These templates define the default customer-facing structure for CPC MLB
packets.

They must be implemented as permanent renderers.

Do not manually assemble, copy, or edit customer packets after generation.


============================================================
TEMPLATE 1
MORNING FULL-SLATE PACKET
============================================================

CAPTAIN'S MLB PREDICTION COMPANION
MORNING FULL-SLATE BOARD
[DISPLAY_DATE]

Generated: [GENERATED_TIME_CT]
Run type: morning_proxy
Games scheduled: [GAME_COUNT]

IMPORTANT

  This morning report uses each team's most recent confirmed locked
  batting order as a lineup proxy.

  Today's official starting pitchers are required.

  Every game will be rerun with today's confirmed lineups before first
  pitch.

MARKET CONTEXT

  Market data is display-only and NOT IN SCORE.

  Missing market prices may disable market comparison, but they must
  not hide or block valid CPC model projections.

============================================================
FAST READ
============================================================

TOP SIDE POSTURES

1. [TEAM_OR_MATCHUP]

   Model posture:
   [POSTURE]

   Projected score:
   [TEAM_A]: [TEAM_A_PROJECTED_RUNS]
   [TEAM_B]: [TEAM_B_PROJECTED_RUNS]

   CPC projected spread:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

   CPC projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   Win probability:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [WIN_PROBABILITY]%

2. [TEAM_OR_MATCHUP]

   Model posture:
   [POSTURE]

   Projected score:
   [TEAM_A]: [TEAM_A_PROJECTED_RUNS]
   [TEAM_B]: [TEAM_B_PROJECTED_RUNS]

   CPC projected spread:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

   CPC projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   Win probability:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [WIN_PROBABILITY]%

3. [TEAM_OR_MATCHUP]

   Model posture:
   [POSTURE]

   Projected score:
   [TEAM_A]: [TEAM_A_PROJECTED_RUNS]
   [TEAM_B]: [TEAM_B_PROJECTED_RUNS]

   CPC projected spread:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

   CPC projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   Win probability:
   [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [WIN_PROBABILITY]%

TOP RUN ENVIRONMENTS

1. [MATCHUP]

   Projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   YRFI:
   [YRFI_PROBABILITY]%

2. [MATCHUP]

   Projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   YRFI:
   [YRFI_PROBABILITY]%

3. [MATCHUP]

   Projected total:
   [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

   YRFI:
   [YRFI_PROBABILITY]%

TOP PITCHER PROP SIGNALS

1. [PITCHER_NAME]

   Matchup:
   [MATCHUP]

   Projection:
   [PROJECTED_K] K

   [LOWEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [MIDDLE_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [HIGHEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

2. [PITCHER_NAME]

   Matchup:
   [MATCHUP]

   Projection:
   [PROJECTED_K] K

   [LOWEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [MIDDLE_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [HIGHEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

3. [PITCHER_NAME]

   Matchup:
   [MATCHUP]

   Projection:
   [PROJECTED_K] K

   [LOWEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [MIDDLE_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

   [HIGHEST_K_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
   [PROBABILITY]%

TOP ANYTIME HOME RUN SIGNALS

[IF HR MODEL IS AVAILABLE]

1. [BATTER_NAME]

   Team:
   [TEAM]

   Batting position:
   [LINEUP_POSITION]

   Opposing starter:
   [OPPOSING_STARTER]

   HR probability:
   [HR_PROBABILITY]%

   Evidence quality:
   [GOOD / MODERATE / LIMITED]

2. [BATTER_NAME]

   Team:
   [TEAM]

   Batting position:
   [LINEUP_POSITION]

   Opposing starter:
   [OPPOSING_STARTER]

   HR probability:
   [HR_PROBABILITY]%

   Evidence quality:
   [GOOD / MODERATE / LIMITED]

3. [BATTER_NAME]

   Team:
   [TEAM]

   Batting position:
   [LINEUP_POSITION]

   Opposing starter:
   [OPPOSING_STARTER]

   HR probability:
   [HR_PROBABILITY]%

   Evidence quality:
   [GOOD / MODERATE / LIMITED]


[IF HR MODEL IS UNAVAILABLE]

Status:
  UNAVAILABLE

Reason:

  The regular-game HR model exists, but the live evidence pipeline did
  not provide complete fresh batter and opposing-starter Statcast
  profiles.

Missing or stale evidence:

  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_1]
  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_2]
  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_3]

Result:

  No HR probability or HR candidate is published.


OPERATIONS WATCH

[DELAYED_OR_WEATHER_GAME]

  Status:
  [OFFICIAL_STATUS]

  Action:
  [REFRESH_OR_HOLD_INSTRUCTION]

[DOUBLEHEADER_GAME]

  Status:
  [OFFICIAL_STATUS]

  Action:

  Refresh bullpen usage, lineups, starters, and weather before the
  affected game.

[OTHER_OPERATIONAL_NOTE]


============================================================
FULL SLATE BOARD
============================================================

------------------------------------------------------------
GAME [GAME_NUMBER]
[AWAY_TEAM] AT [HOME_TEAM]
------------------------------------------------------------

STATUS

  [SCHEDULED / PRE-GAME / DELAYED START / POSTPONED / OTHER]

FIRST PITCH

  [FIRST_PITCH_CT]

VENUE

  [VENUE]

LINEUP MODE

  LAST_LOCKED_LINEUP_PROXY

PROXY LINEUP SOURCE

  [AWAY_TEAM]

  Source:
  [SOURCE]

  Confirmed date:
  [PROXY_LINEUP_DATE]

  Batting-order hash:
  [HASH_OR_CUSTOMER_SAFE_REFERENCE]

  [HOME_TEAM]

  Source:
  [SOURCE]

  Confirmed date:
  [PROXY_LINEUP_DATE]

  Batting-order hash:
  [HASH_OR_CUSTOMER_SAFE_REFERENCE]

STARTING PITCHERS

  [AWAY_TEAM]

  Starter:
  [AWAY_STARTER]

  Status:
  [CONFIRMED / EXPECTED / CHANGED]

  Source time:
  [SOURCE_TIME]

  [HOME_TEAM]

  Starter:
  [HOME_STARTER]

  Status:
  [CONFIRMED / EXPECTED / CHANGED]

  Source time:
  [SOURCE_TIME]

PROJECTED SCORE

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_PROJECTED_RUNS]

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_PROJECTED_RUNS]

CPC PROJECTED SPREAD

  [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

CPC PROJECTED TOTAL

  [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

WIN PROBABILITY

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

FIRST INNING

  YRFI:
  [YRFI_PROBABILITY]%

  NRFI:
  [NRFI_PROBABILITY]%

MODEL POSTURE

  [STRONG LEAN / LEAN / SLIGHT LEAN / PASS]

WHY

  [ONE_TO_THREE_SHORT_SENTENCES_EXPLAINING_THE_MODEL_POSTURE]

PLAYER PROPS

  [AWAY_STARTER] STRIKEOUTS

    Projection:
    [PROJECTED_K] K

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

  [HOME_STARTER] STRIKEOUTS

    Projection:
    [PROJECTED_K] K

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

    [THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
    [PROBABILITY]%

ANYTIME HOME RUN

  [IF AVAILABLE]

  1. [BATTER_NAME]

     HR probability:
     [HR_PROBABILITY]%

     Batting position:
     [LINEUP_POSITION]

     Evidence quality:
     [QUALITY]

  2. [BATTER_NAME]

     HR probability:
     [HR_PROBABILITY]%

     Batting position:
     [LINEUP_POSITION]

     Evidence quality:
     [QUALITY]


  [IF UNAVAILABLE]

  Status:
  UNAVAILABLE

  Reason:

  [SHORT_CUSTOMER_SAFE_REASON]

MODEL LIMITATIONS

  [REAL_LIMITATION_1]

  [REAL_LIMITATION_2]

MARKET COMPARISON

  [IF AVAILABLE]

  CPC model probability:
  [MODEL_PROBABILITY]%

  Market implied probability:
  [MARKET_PROBABILITY]%

  Difference:
  [DIFFERENCE] percentage points


  [IF UNAVAILABLE]

  Status:
  Unavailable

  The CPC projection remains visible.

SOURCE STATUS

  MLB official schedule:
  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

  Starting pitchers:
  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

  Proxy lineups:
  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

  Statistics:
  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

  Weather:
  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

  Model output:
  [BACKED / BLOCKED]

PREGAME REFRESH

  Scheduled refresh:
  [REFRESH_TIME_CT]

  Required action:

  Replace the proxy batting orders with today's confirmed locked
  lineups and rerun every eligible model from scratch.


[REPEAT GAME BLOCK FOR EVERY SCHEDULED GAME]


============================================================
MODEL AVAILABILITY
============================================================

AVAILABLE

  Projected team runs

  CPC projected spread

  CPC projected total

  Win probability

  YRFI and NRFI

  Starting-pitcher strikeout projections

  Strikeout threshold probabilities

  [OTHER_AVAILABLE_MODEL]

UNAVAILABLE OR DEGRADED

  [MODEL_NAME]

  Status:
  [UNAVAILABLE / DEGRADED]

  Reason:
  [REASON]


============================================================
DELIVERY AND AUDIT
============================================================

Packet type:

  morning_proxy

Customer artifact:

  [ARTIFACT_NAME]

Canonical state:

  [CANONICAL_STATE_REFERENCE]

Games included:

  [GAME_COUNT]

Generation result:

  [PASS / BLOCKED]


No trades placed by this workflow.
No bankroll advice.
No order placement.
Research only.


============================================================
TEMPLATE 2
CONFIRMED-LINEUP INDIVIDUAL GAME PACKET
============================================================

CAPTAIN'S MLB PREDICTION COMPANION
CONFIRMED-LINEUP GAME BOARD
[AWAY_TEAM] AT [HOME_TEAM]
[DISPLAY_DATE]


============================================================
STATUS
============================================================

GAME STATUS

  [PRE-GAME / DELAYED START / IN PROGRESS / POSTPONED]

FIRST PITCH

  [FIRST_PITCH_CT]

VENUE

  [VENUE]

RUN TYPE

  confirmed_lineup

GENERATED

  [GENERATED_TIME_CT]


[IF DELAYED]

DELAY NOTICE

  Official status:
  [OFFICIAL_STATUS]

  Scheduled first pitch:
  [SCHEDULED_FIRST_PITCH_CT]

  Latest official update:
  [LATEST_DELAY_UPDATE]

  Model context:

  Pregame projection based on the confirmed locked lineups and starters.


[IF ALREADY IN PROGRESS]

IN-PROGRESS NOTICE

  This is a pregame model projection generated from confirmed locked
  lineups and starters.

  It is not a live in-game projection and does not include events after
  first pitch.


============================================================
RESEARCH STATUS
============================================================

LINEUPS

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  LOCKED

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  LOCKED

STARTERS

  [AWAY_STARTER]:
  CONFIRMED

  [HOME_STARTER]:
  CONFIRMED

WEATHER

  [UPDATED / INDOOR / DEGRADED]

MARKET DATA

  Display-only and NOT IN SCORE


============================================================
FAST READ
============================================================

MODEL POSTURE

  [STRONG LEAN / LEAN / SLIGHT LEAN / PASS]

PROJECTED SCORE

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_PROJECTED_RUNS]

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_PROJECTED_RUNS]

CPC PROJECTED SPREAD

  [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

CPC PROJECTED TOTAL

  [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

WIN PROBABILITY

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

TOP PROP SIGNAL

  [PLAYER_NAME]

  [PROP_DESCRIPTION]:
  [PROBABILITY]%


============================================================
GAME MODEL
============================================================

PROJECTED SCORE

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_PROJECTED_RUNS]

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_PROJECTED_RUNS]

CPC PROJECTED SPREAD

  [PROJECTED_FAVORITE] [PROJECTED_SPREAD]

CALCULATION

  [FAVORITE_PROJECTED_RUNS]

  minus

  [OPPONENT_PROJECTED_RUNS]

  equals

  [PROJECTED_MARGIN]

CPC PROJECTED TOTAL

  [PROJECTED_TOTAL]

WIN PROBABILITY

  [AWAY_TEAM]:
  [AWAY_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

  [HOME_TEAM]:
  [HOME_WIN_PROBABILITY]%

FIRST INNING

  YRFI:
  [YRFI_PROBABILITY]%

  NRFI:
  [NRFI_PROBABILITY]%

MODEL POSTURE

  [MODEL_POSTURE]

WHY

  1. [PRIMARY_MODEL_REASON]

  2. [SECONDARY_MODEL_REASON]

  3. [THIRD_MODEL_REASON]


============================================================
PLAYER PROPS
============================================================

[AWAY_STARTER] - STRIKEOUTS

  Projection:

  [PROJECTED_K] K

  Threshold probabilities:

  [LOWEST_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  [MIDDLE_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  [HIGHEST_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  Prop posture:

  [PROP_POSTURE]


[HOME_STARTER] - STRIKEOUTS

  Projection:

  [PROJECTED_K] K

  Threshold probabilities:

  [LOWEST_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  [MIDDLE_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  [HIGHEST_THRESHOLD]+ strikeouts:
  [PROBABILITY]%

  Prop posture:

  [PROP_POSTURE]


[ADDITIONAL_CONFIGURED_PROP_FAMILY]

  Player:

  [PLAYER_NAME]

  Projection:

  [PROJECTION]

  Threshold probabilities:

  [THRESHOLD_AND_PROBABILITY_LINES]

  Prop posture:

  [PROP_POSTURE]


============================================================
ANYTIME HOME RUN
============================================================

[IF HR MODEL IS AVAILABLE]

1. [BATTER_NAME]

   Team:

   [TEAM]

   Batting position:

   [LINEUP_POSITION]

   Opposing starter:

   [OPPOSING_STARTER]

   HR probability:

   [HR_PROBABILITY]%

   Evidence quality:

   [GOOD / MODERATE / LIMITED]

   Evidence windows:

   Recent:
   [RECENT_WINDOW]

   Trailing:
   [TRAILING_WINDOW]

   Season:
   [SEASON_WINDOW]


2. [BATTER_NAME]

   Team:

   [TEAM]

   Batting position:

   [LINEUP_POSITION]

   Opposing starter:

   [OPPOSING_STARTER]

   HR probability:

   [HR_PROBABILITY]%

   Evidence quality:

   [GOOD / MODERATE / LIMITED]


[IF HR MODEL IS UNAVAILABLE]

STATUS

  UNAVAILABLE

WHY

  The regular-game HR model exists, but the live evidence pipeline did
  not provide complete fresh batter and opposing-starter Statcast
  profiles.

MISSING OR STALE INPUTS

  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_1]

  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_2]

  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_3]

  [MISSING_HR_INPUT_4]

RESULT

  No HR candidate or HR probability is published.

REQUIRED TO UNBLOCK

  Fresh rolling batter Statcast profiles

  Fresh opposing-starter HR profile

  Valid observation dates

  Minimum sample-size validation

  Freshness validation

  Current park and weather context


============================================================
MARKET COMPARISON
============================================================

[IF MARKET CONTEXT IS AVAILABLE]

CPC model posture

  [MODEL_POSTURE]

CPC model probability

  [MODEL_PROBABILITY]%

Market implied probability

  [MARKET_PROBABILITY]%

Difference

  [DIFFERENCE] percentage points

Market data is display-only and NOT IN SCORE.


[IF MARKET CONTEXT IS UNAVAILABLE]

STATUS

  Unavailable

CPC model posture

  [MODEL_POSTURE]

RULE

  Missing market pricing does not erase the CPC model projection.

  Market data is display-only and NOT IN SCORE.


============================================================
LIMITATIONS
============================================================

  The projected score is an expected value, not an exact-score call.

  The CPC projected spread is the difference between the two projected
  team scores.

  [MODEL_LIMITATION_1]

  [MODEL_LIMITATION_2]

  [MODEL_LIMITATION_3]


============================================================
SOURCE STATUS
============================================================

MLB official schedule

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Official game status

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Locked batting orders

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Starting pitchers

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Statistics

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Weather

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

HR evidence

  [BACKED / DEGRADED / MISSING]

Model output

  [BACKED / BLOCKED]


============================================================
DELIVERY AND AUDIT
============================================================

Run type

  confirmed_lineup

Game ID

  [GAME_ID]

Run ID

  [RUN_ID]

Input hash

  [INPUT_HASH]

Output hash

  [OUTPUT_HASH]

Customer artifact

  [ARTIFACT_NAME]

Canonical state

  [CANONICAL_STATE_REFERENCE]

Janitor result

  [PASS / WARNING / BLOCKED]

Delivery status

  [NOT SENT / DELIVERED / BLOCKED]

Telegram document ID

  [MESSAGE_ID_OR_NOT_SENT]


No trades placed by this workflow.
No bankroll advice.
No order placement.
Research only.


============================================================
NON-NEGOTIABLE DEFAULT RENDERER RULES
============================================================

1. These packets must be generated by permanent renderers.

   No hand assembly.

   No manual customer-packet edits after generation.


2. Morning packet:

   One full-slate document using run_type=morning_proxy.


3. Individual packet:

   One game document using run_type=confirmed_lineup.


4. CPC projected spread:

   The projected scoring margin between the two teams.

   Example:

   Detroit projected runs:
   6.3

   Los Angeles projected runs:
   3.6

   CPC projected spread:
   Detroit -2.7


5. The fixed baseball market run line of 1.5 is not CPC's projected
   spread.


6. Market prices cannot enter CPC model scoring, ranking, or posture.


7. Missing market prices cannot convert a valid CPC projection into
   NO CLEAR PICK or BLOCKED_SOURCE_GAP.


8. Confirmed-lineup packets cannot contain stale classifications such
   as PRE_LINEUP_PICK.


9. Model posture must agree with the visible model output.


10. Every configured eligible prop family must receive a visible
    section.


11. Unavailable model families must state exactly why they are
    unavailable.


12. HR output may only appear when batter and pitcher rolling profiles
    pass freshness, observation-date, and minimum-sample validation.


13. If HR evidence is unavailable, the renderer must publish a concise
    unavailable section instead of fabricating candidates.


14. Mobile formatting requirements:

    No wide tables.

    No dense walls of text.

    No line materially wider than 80 characters.

    One metric per line where practical.

    Blank lines between major sections.

    Consistent section order for every game.


15. Important projections must appear before technical source details.


16. Customer-visible sections must include:

    Projected score

    CPC projected spread

    CPC projected total

    Win probability

    YRFI and NRFI

    Pitcher strikeout projections

    Strikeout threshold probabilities

    Anytime-HR output or honest unavailable status

    Model posture

    Concise explanation

    Limitations

    Market context

    Source status


17. Internal filesystem paths and full hashes should remain in audit
    sidecars unless explicitly required in the customer document.


18. The exact rendered customer artifact must pass automated validation
    and complete literal review before delivery.


19. Production artifacts and delivery ledgers must use canonical state
    independent of the active checkout or worktree.


20. A successful send must prove:

    True sender exit code

    Telegram notice and document message IDs

    Artifact SHA-256

    Canonical ledger entry

    Duplicate-send protection


============================================================
DEFINITION OF DONE
============================================================

The default renderer change is complete only when:

  The morning full-slate renderer produces this structure automatically.

  The confirmed-lineup renderer produces this structure automatically.

  No customer packet requires manual text assembly or correction.

  Projected spread is derived from projected team scores.

  Model posture remains visible without market pricing.

  Every eligible prop family is shown.

  HR either produces validated candidates or an honest unavailable
  section.

  Mobile formatting passes automated checks.

  Canonical state and delivery-ledger behavior are proven.

  Exact customer-facing artifacts are reviewed before any production
  send.

  Focused tests pass.

  Existing baseline failures are unchanged.

  The final diff is reviewed.

  The change is committed, pushed, merged, and ancestry verified.
